hooks.command:
bash -c '
SESSION_DONE="/Users/almashomefolder/Documents/Claude/Projects/Juku-Flutter/.claude/session_done"
HANDOVER="/Users/almashomefolder/Documents/Claude/Projects/The-Builder/HANDOVER.md"

# If intentional exit flag is set, allow clean exit.
# DO NOT delete the flag here — deleting causes a race condition where Claude
# sends one more message, hook fires again with no flag, and forces continuation.
# The wrapper script (start-juku-flutter.sh) deletes it on next session start.
if [ -f "$SESSION_DONE" ]; then
  osascript -e "display notification \"Session complete — clean exit\" with title \"Juku\""
  exit 0
fi

# Only force continuation if HANDOVER.md has pending work marker
if grep -qE "⏳" "$HANDOVER" 2>/dev/null; then
  osascript -e "display notification \"Pending work found — forcing continuation\" with title \"Juku\""
  echo "Pending tasks remain. Read HANDOVER.md and continue building. Do NOT stop." >&2
  exit 2
fi

# No pending work — allow exit
osascript -e "display notification \"Build complete\" with title \"Juku\""
exit 0
'
